testcase.name: test_request_error_no_free_phones

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'HTTP Error: 400' == '5Sim has no free phones'
- 5Sim has no free phones + HTTP Error: 400

testcase.failure:
mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4688087088'> fivesim = <ninjemail.sms_services.fivesim.FiveSim object at 0x116627f00>
def test_request_error_no_free_phones(mock_requests_get, fivesim): mock_response = mock_requests_get.return_value mock_response.status_code = 400 mock_response.text = "no free phones"
with pytest.raises(APIError) as exc_info: fivesim.request('no_phone') > assert str(exc_info.value) == '5Sim has no free phones' E AssertionError: assert 'HTTP Error: 400' == '5Sim has no free phones' E E - 5Sim has no free phones E + HTTP Error: 400
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_5sim.py:82: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_request_error_not_enough_balance

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'HTTP Error: 400' == 'Not enough balance'
- Not enough balance + HTTP Error: 400

testcase.failure:
mock_requests_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4688090112'> fivesim = <ninjemail.sms_services.fivesim.FiveSim object at 0x117651a50>
def test_request_error_not_enough_balance(mock_requests_get, fivesim): mock_response = mock_requests_get.return_value mock_response.status_code = 400 mock_response.text = "not enough user balance"
with pytest.raises(APIError) as exc_info: fivesim.request('no_balance') > assert str(exc_info.value) == 'Not enough balance' E AssertionError: assert 'HTTP Error: 400' == 'Not enough balance' E E - Not enough balance E + HTTP Error: 400
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_5sim.py:91: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_request
testcase.failure:
mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4688094144'> gs = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x1165b2c40>
@patch("treq.post") def test_request(mock_post, gs): mock_post.return_value.raise_for_status.return_value = None mock_post.return_value.text = "Success" > response = gs.request(action="getmobile") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_getsmscode.py:47: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x1165b2c40> kwargs = {'action': 'getmobile'} res = <MagicMock name='post()' id='4688093808'>
def request(self, **kwargs): """ Sends a POST request to the GetsmsCode API with the provided arguments.
Args: kwargs (dict): Additional arguments to be included in the request body.
Returns: str: The API response text.
Raises: APIError: If the API returns an error message. """ if self.country not in {"us", "cn"}: kwargs["cocode"] = self.country
res = treq.post( self.API_URL, data=dict( username=self.user, token=self.token, pid=self.project, **kwargs, ) )
if res.status_code != 200: > raise APIError(f"Error: {res.status_code} - {res.content.decode('utf-8')}") E ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.APIError: Error: <MagicMock name='post().status_code' id='4688094816'> - <MagicMock name='post().content.decode()' id='4688096496'>
ninjemail/sms_services/getsmscode.py:113: APIError

testcase.name: test_get_phone
testcase.failure:
mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4688097504'> gs = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x1165b3230>
@patch("treq.post") def test_get_phone(mock_post, gs): mock_post.return_value.raise_for_status.return_value = None mock_post.return_value.text = "234567" > phone = gs.get_phone() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_getsmscode.py:54: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ninjemail/sms_services/getsmscode.py:140: in get_phone data = self.request(**data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x1165b3230> kwargs = {'action': 'getmobile'} res = <MagicMock name='post()' id='4688097168'>
def request(self, **kwargs): """ Sends a POST request to the GetsmsCode API with the provided arguments.
Args: kwargs (dict): Additional arguments to be included in the request body.
Returns: str: The API response text.
Raises: APIError: If the API returns an error message. """ if self.country not in {"us", "cn"}: kwargs["cocode"] = self.country
res = treq.post( self.API_URL, data=dict( username=self.user, token=self.token, pid=self.project, **kwargs, ) )
if res.status_code != 200: > raise APIError(f"Error: {res.status_code} - {res.content.decode('utf-8')}") E ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.APIError: Error: <MagicMock name='post().status_code' id='4688098176'> - <MagicMock name='post().content.decode()' id='4688099856'>

testcase.name: test_get_phone_with_prefix
testcase.failure:
mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4688100864'> gs = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x117764170>
@patch("treq.post") def test_get_phone_with_prefix(mock_post, gs): mock_post.return_value.raise_for_status.return_value = None mock_post.return_value.text = "1234567" > phone = gs.get_phone(send_prefix=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ninjemail/tests/test_sms_getsmscode.py:61: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ninjemail/sms_services/getsmscode.py:140: in get_phone data = self.request(**data) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.GetsmsCode object at 0x117764170> kwargs = {'action': 'getmobile'} res = <MagicMock name='post()' id='4688100528'>
def request(self, **kwargs): """ Sends a POST request to the GetsmsCode API with the provided arguments.
Args: kwargs (dict): Additional arguments to be included in the request body.
Returns: str: The API response text.
Raises: APIError: If the API returns an error message. """ if self.country not in {"us", "cn"}: kwargs["cocode"] = self.country
res = treq.post( self.API_URL, data=dict( username=self.user, token=self.token, pid=self.project, **kwargs, ) )
if res.status_code != 200: > raise APIError(f"Error: {res.status_code} - {res.content.decode('utf-8')}") E ninjemail.sms_services.getsmscode.APIError: Error: <MagicMock name='post().status_code' id='4688871840'> - <MagicMock name='post().content.decode()' id='4688873520'>
ninjemail/sms_services/getsmscode.py:113: APIError
